pi_items.source: Found hardcoded in export_result.sh (raw_data >= 55000) and confirmed via task instructions.
Found hardcoded in export_result.sh checking mask_data[sat_mask] == 0.
Confirmed by analyzing setup_task.sh (creates TARGET_FILE) and export_result.sh (RAW_FILE variable).

privileged_info_summary: The data source is real scientific FITS imaging data (primarily from the WASP-12b calibrated images dataset from the University of Louisville, downloaded during setup). Analysis of setup_task.sh and export_result.sh confirms the FITS input file is placed at /home/ga/AstroImages/quality_control/science_raw.fits. The evaluation script checks that pixels with values >= 55000 (threshold) in the original image are replaced with exactly 0 (mask_value) in the output file /home/ga/AstroImages/processed/science_masked.fits, and expects a count report at /home/ga/AstroImages/processed/mask_report.txt.
